title: Trips and Users
description: Bảng Trips (id, client_id, driver_id, city_id, status, request_at) và Users (users_id, banned, role). Tính tỷ lệ chuyến không bị hủy (status != 'cancelled') theo ngày request_at, chỉ client role='client' và banned='No'. Làm tròn 2 chữ số.

examples.input: Trips 2013-10-01..03 mixed status; banned clients excluded

approach: JOIN Trips t với Users u ON client_id=users_id WHERE role='client' AND banned='No'; GROUP BY DATE(request_at); rate=ROUND(SUM(status!='cancelled')/COUNT(*), 2).
memoryTip: Trips and Users = filter client not banned, group by day, non-cancelled ratio.

solutions.python:
# SQL
SELECT Request_at AS Day,
  ROUND(SUM(CASE WHEN Status != 'cancelled' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) / COUNT(*), 2) AS Cancellation_Rate
FROM Trips t
JOIN Users u ON t.Client_Id = u.Users_Id
WHERE u.Banned = 'No' AND u.Role = 'client'
GROUP BY Day
ORDER BY Day;
solutions.cpp:
// SQL
SELECT Request_at AS Day,
  ROUND(SUM(CASE WHEN Status != 'cancelled' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) / COUNT(*), 2) AS Cancellation_Rate
FROM Trips t
JOIN Users u ON t.Client_Id = u.Users_Id
WHERE u.Banned = 'No' AND u.Role = 'client'
GROUP BY Day
ORDER BY Day;
solutions.c:
/* SQL */
SELECT Request_at AS Day,
  ROUND(SUM(CASE WHEN Status != 'cancelled' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) / COUNT(*), 2) AS Cancellation_Rate
FROM Trips t
JOIN Users u ON t.Client_Id = u.Users_Id
WHERE u.Banned = 'No' AND u.Role = 'client'
GROUP BY Day
ORDER BY Day;

analysis.correctness: Mỗi ngày: tỷ lệ chuyến completed (non-cancelled) trên tổng chuyến client hợp lệ.
edgeCases: Ngày không trip → không xuất hiện
